title: Aftersun
logline: Twenty years after a Turkish holiday with her father, adult Sophie revisits their shared memories through DV footage, confronting the gap between a child's perception and an adult's understanding of depression and loss.
antagonistOrConflict: Calum's hidden depression and the inevitable loss that Sophie, as a child, couldn't fully comprehend
themes: The gap between childhood innocence and adult understanding

actBreaks.description: The rooftop cafe conversation deepens their relationship and reveals Calum's vulnerability, shifting from vacation setup to emotional exploration.

validation.ruling: Scene #57 shows Sophie and Calum at a rooftop cafe discussing serious topics like smoking and family, marking a shift from vacation activities to deeper emotional territory and more intimate father-daughter conversations that will define the rest of their trip.

actBreaks.description: The reveal of Adult Sophie in her apartment with a child crying off-screen confirms the present-day framing and Calum's absence from her adult life.

validation.ruling: Scene #107 shows Adult Sophie nearing the deteriorating Calum in the rave as he looks like death with extreme close-ups of his strained eyes and ashen skin - this represents the final approach to confronting the truth about her father's mental state and sets up the climactic resolution.

naturalStructure.structuralPersonality:
This is a memory film that operates through emotional archaeology rather than traditional plot mechanics. The script uses a tripartite structure: vacation memories (past), rave sequences (liminal/subconscious), and brief present-day moments (Adult Sophie's reality). The DV footage serves as both narrative device and emotional anchor, creating intimacy while highlighting the gap between recorded moments and lived experience. The structure mirrors how memory works—non-linear, fragmented, with certain moments gaining significance only in retrospect.

The rave sequences function as a metaphysical space where Adult Sophie attempts to reach her father, representing her adult understanding trying to connect with what she couldn't grasp as a child. The script's genius lies in how it withholds explicit information about Calum's fate while making his depression visible to adult eyes through seemingly innocent vacation moments.
naturalStructure.pacingNotes: The pacing is deliberately contemplative, with short scenes (1.2 pages average) creating a mosaic effect. The script accelerates in the final act (scenes 124-130) with rapid cuts between rave and hotel, building to the emotional climax where Adult Sophie finally 'reaches' Calum in scene 128, only to lose him again in scene 130. The DV footage scenes provide rhythmic breathing room and authentic texture throughout.

incitingIncident.description: On a packed transfer bus in Turkey, passengers pass a fallen battery back to Calum who has a plaster cast on his arm, while tour rep Belinda introduces herself before the sound system cuts out.

validation.ruling: Scene #2 is just setup footage that doesn't shatter Sophie's ordinary world. Scene #5 shows Sophie and Calum on the transfer bus in Turkey with tour rep Belinda introducing herself - this marks their actual arrival in the foreign setting that begins their vacation adventure and establishes the main relationship dynamic of the story.

midpoint.description: Calum and Sophie play chess on the balcony while Calum drinks beer and offers Sophie a sip, which she takes and winces at.
midpoint.sceneHeading: 78 EXT. HOTEL ROOM BALCONY - NIGHT (MUSIC SEQUENCE) 78 78

validation.ruling: Scene #77 is a quiet chess game that doesn't create a significant shift. Scene #76 shows Sophie and Calum filming themselves with the DV camera while Calum's self-help and meditation books are visible - this moment of self-documentation and the revelation of Calum's struggles marks a shift toward more intimate, proactive engagement with their relationship and his internal state.

climax.description: Calum vanishes from the rave, leaving Adult Sophie standing alone until the strobe cuts to black.

validation.ruling: Scene #128 is just a brief moment of euphoria before the climax. Scene #129 is the true climax where Calum vanishes from the rave, leaving Adult Sophie standing alone until the strobe cuts to black - this is the peak emotional confrontation where Sophie loses her father forever and represents the ultimate resolution of her search for connection with him.

scenes.heading: 1 INT. A RAVE 1 1
scenes.summary: Adult Sophie stands motionless in a rave crowd as strobing lights alternate her image with that of her 11-year-old self in identical clothing.

scenes.heading: 2 INT. AIRPORT - DAY 2 2
scenes.summary: DV cam footage shows an airport security queue, then cuts to black and rewinds through blurred images of faces, hotel room, sea and sky before clicking to restart from the beginning.
scenes.turningPointNote: Establishes the video footage framing device that will structure the narrative

scenes.heading: 3 INT. PLANE - DAY 3 3
scenes.summary: DV cam footage continues with abstract colors and sounds, then shows still images of a child's open mouth and tongue before revealing Calum's face as a PA announcement plays.

scenes.heading: 4 EXT. AIRPORT LANDING STRIP - EARLY DUSK 4 4
scenes.summary: A PA announcement about seat belts fades as Calum's face gives way to purple dusk and a plane passes overhead with the main title appearing.

scenes.heading: 5 INT. TRANSFER BUS - LATE DUSK 5 5
scenes.summary: On a packed transfer bus in Turkey, passengers pass a fallen battery back to Calum who has a plaster cast on his arm, while tour rep Belinda introduces herself before the sound system cuts out.

scenes.heading: 6 INT. TRANSFER BUS - NIGHT - A LITTLE LATER 6 6
scenes.summary: Sophie sleeps against Calum's shoulder on the bus as families are called off at their hotels, and she playfully smushes his face while reaching for a fallen headphone.

scenes.heading: 7 EXT. STREET - NIGHT - LATER 7 7
scenes.summary: Belinda mistakes Sophie for Calum's little sister rather than his daughter, and they share a private joke as other guests head to the Ocean Park Resort while they approach their own hotel.

scenes.heading: 8 EXT. STREET - NIGHT - MOMENTS LATER 8 8
scenes.summary: Calum and Sophie laugh together mimicking Belinda's accent as they walk to their hotel and disappear through its entrance.

scenes.heading: 9 INT. TÜRK HOTEL RECEPTION - NIGHT 9 9
scenes.summary: Calum rings the bell at an unmanned hotel reception while Sophie waits in a chair, pets a large dog, and looks through magazines on the table.

scenes.heading: 10 INT. HOTEL ROOM - NIGHT 10 10
scenes.summary: Sophie lies asleep fully clothed on the only bed while Calum sits on the bed's edge and picks up the phone.

scenes.heading: 11 INT. HOTEL ROOM - NIGHT - MOMENTS LATER 11 11
scenes.summary: Calum struggles with his cast to remove Sophie's shoes and socks while on the phone complaining about getting only one bed instead of the two he booked.

scenes.heading: 12 EXT. HOTEL ROOM BALCONY - NIGHT 12 12
scenes.summary: Calum struggles to light a cigarette with his broken hand on the hotel balcony overlooking scaffolding and a pool, eventually succeeding and turning up his Walkman.

scenes.heading: 13 EXT. HOTEL ROOM BALCONY - NIGHT - A LITTLE LATER 13 13
scenes.summary: Calum sits precariously on the balcony railing with his legs dangling over a three-story drop, smoking and watching a hotel employee clean up bottles by the pool.

scenes.heading: 14 EXT. TÜRK HOTEL - EARLY MORNING 14 14
scenes.summary: Construction work begins early with drilling and metal clanging as a hotel employee opens sun beds around the pool and the hotel dog wanders nearby.

scenes.heading: 15 INT. HOTEL ROOM - MORNING 15 15
scenes.summary: Sophie and Calum lie in identical face-down positions on the bed as construction work continues outside.

scenes.heading: 16 EXT. TÜRK HOTEL POOLSIDE - DAY 16 16
scenes.summary: Calum films Sophie playing on a pool lilo and trying to stand on it like a surfboard before she topples into the water, while he explains the camera's auto-exposure feature.

scenes.heading: 17 EXT. UNDERWATER - CONTINUOUS 17 17
scenes.summary: Sophie holds her breath underwater with eyes open as the empty lilo floats above her, while Calum calls for her to surface.

scenes.heading: 18 EXT. TÜRK HOTEL POOLSIDE - DAY - MOMENTS LATER 18 18
scenes.summary: Calum applies sunscreen to Sophie's back while she reads the camera manual, and they discuss calling her mother and how Sophie comes home pale from trips with him.

scenes.heading: 19 EXT. STREET - LATE AFTERNOON 19 19
scenes.summary: Sophie points at paragliders overhead as she and Calum walk toward the Ocean Park Resort, practicing Turkish phrases.

scenes.heading: 20 INT. OCEAN PARK RESORT FOYER - LATE AFTERNOON - CONTINOUS 20 20
scenes.summary: In the Ocean Park Resort foyer, Calum takes Sophie's hand to avoid a wet patch left by running teens, but she immediately drops it and watches the teens leave while eyeing a gaming area sign.

scenes.heading: 21 INT. OCEAN PARK RESORT MEETING ROOM - MOMENTS LATER 21 21
scenes.summary: Calum realizes he missed the 4pm meeting because his watch was an hour behind, curses himself, and adjusts his watch to the correct time.

scenes.heading: 22 INT. OCEAN PARK RESORT GAMING/BAR AREA - LATE AFTERNOON 22 22
scenes.summary: Sophie plays an arcade motorcycle game with intense focus while a group of teens plays pool behind her, and she crashes and slams the handlebars in frustration as the game times out.

scenes.heading: 23 EXT. OCEAN PARK RESORT DINING AREA - NIGHT 23 23
scenes.summary: At dinner, Sophie asks about Alice and Calum explains that Alice got back together with her boyfriend, then they laugh and run away from the resort's entertainment show.

scenes.heading: 24 EXT. STREET - NIGHT - CONTINUOUS 24 24
scenes.summary: Sophie and Calum run hand in hand across the street laughing hysterically, and when Sophie trips, Calum catches and carries her into their hotel.

scenes.heading: 25 INT. HOTEL ROOM - NIGHT - LATER 25 25
scenes.summary: Calum lies awake on a fold-out bed watching DV cam playback on the camera while Sophie sleeps, reviewing footage of his broken arm visible while showering.

scenes.heading: 26 INT. RAVE 26 26
scenes.summary: Adult Sophie pushes through the rave crowd with steady focus, spotting Calum across the room but losing sight of him as people cross between them.

scenes.heading: 27 INT. HOTEL BATHROOM - EARLY MORNING 27 27
scenes.summary: Calum sits in the bathtub as shower water beats down on his chest and the water level rises around him.

scenes.heading: 28 INT. HOTEL BATHROOM - A LITTLE LATER 28 28
scenes.summary: Calum lies in the full bathtub with a wet cloth over his face, breathing slowly in makeshift meditation until Sophie knocks needing to use the bathroom, and he forces himself to liven up.

scenes.heading: 29 INT. OCEAN PARK RESORT FOYER - LATE MORNING 29 29
scenes.summary: Sophie talks on a payphone in the resort corridor, laughing warmly and discussing school starting Tuesday and their hotel situation.

scenes.heading: 30 INT. OCEAN PARK RESORT GAMING/BAR AREA - MOMENTS LATER 30 30
scenes.summary: Sophie enters the gaming area but finds both motorcycle arcade machines occupied by two drunk men in their 50s who roar as the bikes thud under their weight.

scenes.heading: 31 INT. OCEAN PARK RESORT FOYER - MOMENTS LATER 31 31
scenes.summary: Sophie listens as Calum finishes a phone call with her mother, expressing happiness for someone, then he startles when he sees Sophie behind him and playfully flips her upside down.

scenes.heading: 32 EXT. OCEAN PARK RESORT LUNCH AREA - MIDDAY 32 32
scenes.summary: Sophie and Calum play a capitals quiz game over lunch, with Sophie successfully answering most questions until she gets stumped by Hungary, and a waiter corrects Calum's answer about Turkey's capital.

scenes.heading: 33 INT. OCEAN PARK RESORT GAMING/BAR AREA - AFTERNOON 33 33
scenes.summary: Sophie waits behind two boys playing arcade motorcycles, then takes a turn and works her way up the field while Michael watches and groans at his own performance.

scenes.heading: 34 INT. OCEAN PARK RESORT GAMING/BAR AREA - AFTERNOON 34 34
scenes.summary: Sophie signs up for Friday's pool tournament and practices shots while Calum teaches her how to pot balls touching the cushion.

scenes.heading: 35 INT. TOILET - MOMENTS LATER 35 35
scenes.summary: Sophie practices saying crude phrases in the toilet stall, then overhears two teenage girls discussing sexual activities through a hole in the door.

scenes.heading: 36 INT. OCEAN PARK RESORT GAMING/BAR AREA - MOMENTS LATER 36 36
scenes.summary: Sophie challenges two teenage boys to doubles pool, and despite Toby joking about Calum's cast being an advantage, they agree to play while Calum winks at Sophie who glares back.

scenes.heading: 37 INT. HOTEL ROOM - EVENING 37 37
scenes.summary: Calum teaches Sophie how to break free from a wrist grab by twisting against the weak point where fingers connect, pulling too forcefully and hurting her slightly.

scenes.heading: 38 INT. HOTEL ROOM - NIGHT 38 38
scenes.summary: Calum gently cleans Sophie's face with cotton wool and face cleanser while explaining the wrist-breaking technique is for self-defense if anyone tries to attack her.

scenes.heading: 39 EXT. TÜRK HOTEL POOLSIDE - UNDERWATER - MORNING 39 39
scenes.summary: Calum and Sophie take underwater photographs of each other in the pool, with Sophie beckoning for the camera and both posing before rising to the surface together.

scenes.heading: 40 EXT. TÜRK HOTEL POOLSIDE - DAY - A LITTLE LATER 40 40
scenes.summary: Sophie and Calum lie poolside in identical positions watching paragliders, and Sophie shares her thought about how they share the same sky even when apart, which touches Calum.

scenes.heading: 41 EXT. STREET - DAY 41 41
scenes.summary: Sophie and Calum practice tongue twisters while walking, and Calum asks Sophie to check his sunburned back by lifting his shirt.

scenes.heading: 42 INT. HAMAM STEAM ROOM - A LITTLE LATER 42 42
scenes.summary: In an empty steam room, Sophie sits across from sleeping Calum until two older men enter, making Calum uncomfortable enough to have Sophie move beside him.

scenes.heading: 43 INT. HAMAM SHOWER - A LITTLE LATER 43 43
scenes.summary: Calum stands under a cold shower while Sophie watches suspiciously, and they negotiate over how long she'll stay under the freezing water before she reluctantly agrees to five seconds.

scenes.heading: 44 INT. HOTEL BATHROOM - NIGHT 44 44
scenes.summary: Calum sits on the bathtub edge soaking his cast in a bucket of water, peeling away loosened plaster while Sophie asks if breaking his wrist hurt.

scenes.heading: 45 INT. HOTEL ROOM - CONTINUOUS 45 45
scenes.summary: Sophie reads a magazine on the bed and asks why Calum and her mother still say 'love you' despite not being together, while Calum explains from the bathroom that her mother is family.

scenes.heading: 46 INT. HOTEL BATHROOM - CONTINUOUS 46 46
scenes.summary: Calum cuts his cast with scissors while Sophie recalls thinking as a child that her parents were getting married when her mother said Calum was 'engaged' on the phone.

scenes.heading: 47 INT. HOTEL ROOM - CONTINUOUS 47 47
scenes.summary: Sophie reluctantly puts down her magazine to read the book Calum gave her and asks what 'municipal' means while Calum stares down at the bucket as water drips.

scenes.heading: 49 EXT. DIVE BOAT/WATER - DAY 49 49
scenes.summary: Sophie stands on a dive boat bow preparing to jump while Calum treads water below, but a teen cuts in front of her and dive bombs first, followed by Sophie doing the same.

scenes.heading: 50 EXT. DIVE BOAT DECK - A LITTLE LATER 50 50
scenes.summary: Sophie easily slips into a dry wetsuit while Calum struggles with a wet one, and she watches a couple intimately applying sunscreen before dive instructor Onur fits her with a mask.

scenes.heading: 51 EXT. WATER 51 51
scenes.summary: Sophie, Calum, and instructor Onur float on the water surface practicing hand signals for 'okay,' 'stop,' and 'up' before diving.

scenes.heading: 52 EXT. WATER - MOMENTS LATER 52 52
scenes.summary: Sophie and Calum put regulators in their mouths, take breaths from air tanks, and gradually descend underwater while holding deflator hoses above their heads.

scenes.heading: 53 EXT. UNDERWATER - CONTINUOUS 53 53
scenes.summary: Underwater, Onur signals okay to Calum and Sophie, pulls Sophie down when she drifts upward, adjusts her buoyancy, leads them to coral reef, and returns with something after reaching toward the coral.

scenes.heading: 54 INT. DIVE BOAT 54 54
scenes.summary: Sophie films herself with the DV camera giving an enthusiastic report about her diving experience, describing a seahorse wrapping its tail around her finger and seeing a real octopus.

scenes.heading: 55 EXT. UNDERWATER 55 55
scenes.summary: Calum, alone in full scuba gear, descends deeper and deeper in open water until he is completely enveloped by darkness as rave music fades in.

scenes.heading: 56 INT. RAVE 56 56
scenes.summary: Adult Sophie pushes through an increasingly tight crowd at a rave, glimpsing Calum dancing with what appears to be abandon but feels desperate and endless.

scenes.heading: 57 EXT. ROOFTOP CAFE - AFTERNOON 57 57
scenes.summary: Sophie and Calum sit at a rooftop cafe drinking tea and milkshake while Sophie warns about smoking causing health problems and asks when Calum last visited Nana.

scenes.heading: 58 INT. OCEAN PARK RESORT GAMING/BAR AREA - LATE AFTERNOON 58 58
scenes.summary: Sophie pretends to play the motorbike arcade game while waiting for her dad to get money, then Michael shows her how to use a British ten pence coin in the slot.

scenes.heading: 59 EXT. STREET NEAR HOTEL - LATE AFTERNOON - SIMULTANOUS 59 59
scenes.summary: Calum crosses a road and narrowly misses being hit by a departing tour bus after a loud honk.

scenes.heading: 60 INT. OCEAN PARK RESORT GAMING/BAR AREA - LATE AFTERNOON 60 60
scenes.summary: Michael and Sophie race on the arcade motorbikes, with Michael winning at the final approach and declaring the score 1-1 while Sophie claims she didn't know they were keeping count.

scenes.heading: 61 INT. HOTEL ROOM - EVENING 61 61
scenes.summary: Sophie lies on the bed feeling down and tells Calum through the bathroom door that she feels like she's crashing and sinking after being on a high.

scenes.heading: 62 INT. HOTEL BATHROOM - CONTINUOUS 62 62
scenes.summary: Calum brushes his teeth in the bathroom with infinity mirrors while listening to Sophie describe feeling down, avoiding his own gaze and spitting foamy toothpaste.

scenes.heading: 63 INT. HOTEL BATHROOM - EARLY MORNING 63 63
scenes.summary: Light creeps into the bathroom as the sun rises, showing dried spit on the mirror while construction drilling sounds in the background.

scenes.heading: 64 EXT. STREET - DAY 64 64
scenes.summary: Calum and Sophie walk toward the public beach past shops and stalls while Calum suggests getting something nice to send back to her mum and jokingly refuses Sophie's PlayStation request.

scenes.heading: 65 EXT. POSTCARD STAND - CONTINUOUS 65 65
scenes.summary: At a postcard stand, Sophie announces she wants to get her ears pierced before school starts, but Calum firmly refuses, saying she's too young to alter her body.

scenes.heading: 66 EXT. HAIR BRAIDING STALL - CONTINUOUS 66 66
scenes.summary: Sophie gets her hair braided at a stall while a woman approaches Calum asking him to take her picture, and Calum tells Sophie to meet him next door when done.

scenes.heading: 67 INT. CARPET SHOP 67 67
scenes.summary: In a carpet shop, Calum crouches before a beautiful rug while the salesman explains its provenance, and Calum becomes visibly emotional as his hand glides along the wool.

scenes.heading: 68 EXT. TÜRK HOTEL POOLSIDE - AFTERNOON 68 68
scenes.summary: At the poolside during post-lunch lull, Sophie complains about the carpet's £1000 price while Calum explains it's a collectible investment, and Sophie threatens to tell her mum.

scenes.heading: 69 INT. OCEAN PARK RESORT GAMING/BAR AREA - A LITTLE LATER 69 69
scenes.summary: Laura sits at the bar with table tennis bat earrings while Olly and Toby set up a table, and Sophie observes Laura's tan lines and freckles.

scenes.heading: 70 INT. HOTEL ROOM 70 70
scenes.summary: Calum practices Tai Chi in the bedroom, fails to maintain calm, grabs his wallet and leaves.

scenes.heading: 71 INT. OCEAN PARK RESORT GAMING/BAR AREA - A LITTLE LATER 71 71
scenes.summary: Sophie plays pool and cheats by lifting the white ball out of the pocket when the teens aren't paying attention, then returns it in a crisis of confidence.

scenes.heading: 72 EXT. OCEAN PARK RESORT POOLSIDE - CONTINUOUS 72 72
scenes.summary: Sophie pushes Scott into the pool, followed by the other teens jumping in, but she's left standing on the edge a moment too long before finally jumping in.

scenes.heading: 73 EXT. UNDERWATER - CONTINUOUS 73 73
scenes.summary: Underwater, Sophie sees Laura and Olly embracing while her own white t-shirt becomes translucent, exposing her flat chest compared to Laura's bra outline.

scenes.heading: 74 EXT. OCEAN PARK RESORT POOLSIDE - CONTINUOUS 74 74
scenes.summary: Sophie quietly slides out of the pool and leaves while still drenched.

scenes.heading: 75 INT. CARPET SHOP - CONTINUOUS 75 75
scenes.summary: Calum gazes at the intricate carpet patterns while the salesman brings him tea and they shake hands.

scenes.heading: 76 INT. HOTEL ROOM - AFTERNOON 76 76
scenes.summary: Sophie changes out of wet clothes, puts on a red checkered dress with her bikini top as a bra, and tidies the room while finding a matchbook with three matches missing.

scenes.heading: 77 INT. HOTEL ROOM - EARLY EVENING 77 77
scenes.summary: Sophie and Calum film themselves with the DV camera connected to the TV, showing their room and beds while Calum's self-help and meditation books are visible stacked by the television.

scenes.heading: 78 EXT. HOTEL ROOM BALCONY - NIGHT (MUSIC SEQUENCE) 78 78
scenes.summary: Calum and Sophie play chess on the balcony while Calum drinks beer and offers Sophie a sip, which she takes and winces at.

scenes.heading: 79 INT. HOTEL ROOM - A LITTLE LATER (MUSIC SEQUENCE) 79 79
scenes.summary: Calum holds Sophie in a tight hug with her legs wrapped around his waist while they discuss Scotland and belonging.

scenes.heading: 80 INT. HOTEL ROOM - A LITTLE LATER (MUSIC SEQUENCE) 80 80
scenes.summary: Calum tucks Sophie into bed and tells her she can live wherever she wants and be whoever she wants to be, that she has time.

scenes.heading: 81 EXT. HOTEL ROOM BALCONY (MUSIC SEQUENCE) 81 81
scenes.summary: Calum passes families chatting and laughing at the bar and pool area on his way out of the hotel.

scenes.heading: 82 INT. NOIZ - LOCAL NIGHTCLUB (MUSIC SEQUENCE) 82 82
scenes.summary: At the nightclub Noiz, Calum smokes, drinks, dances with a woman in silhouette, and kisses her.

scenes.heading: 83 INT. RAVE (MUSIC SEQUENCE) 83 83
scenes.summary: Adult Sophie observes someone offering Calum a pill at the rave, watches him take it, and for the first time looks away.
scenes.turningPointNote: Adult Sophie witnesses Calum taking drugs and turns away, marking her inability to watch his self-destruction

scenes.heading: 84 INT. TÜRK HOTEL CORRIDOR - NIGHT (MUSIC SEQUENCE) 84 84
scenes.summary: The camera tracks down an empty hotel corridor past closed doors, reaching an opening that looks out over the street with lights glimmering through darkness.

scenes.heading: 85 EXT. STREET - EARLY MORNING 85 85
scenes.summary: Early morning shows the bright sun, empty pool area with towels marking taken sun beds, and the hotel dog chasing its tail.

scenes.heading: 86 EXT. HOTEL ROOM BALCONY - EARLY MORNING 86 86
scenes.summary: Calum stands perfectly still on top of the balcony railing facing the poolside with his back to camera while paragliders fall above.
scenes.turningPointNote: Calum stands on the balcony railing in a moment that suggests suicidal ideation, revealing the depth of his crisis

scenes.heading: 87 INT. TÜRK HOTEL DINING ROOM - MORNING 87 87
scenes.summary: Sophie carries a full breakfast tray while Calum sits with just coffee, stirring in cream and murmuring to himself as Sophie jokes about talking to yourself being a sign of madness.

scenes.heading: 88 EXT. OCEAN PARK RESORT POOLSIDE - DAY 88 88
scenes.summary: Sophie and Calum lie on sun beds with headphones, Sophie falling asleep over postcards while Calum offers to apply sunscreen and Sophie curtly says she'll do it herself.

scenes.heading: 89 EXT. OCEAN PARK RESORT POOLSIDE - DAY 89 89
scenes.summary: During a water polo game, Sophie struggles to get the ball while it's passed around and over her, until an overeager man slams it hard and hits her square in the face.

scenes.heading: 90 EXT. OCEAN PARK RESORT POOLSIDE - MOMENTS LATER 90 90
scenes.summary: Sophie sobs hunched over with blood streaming from her nose while Calum panics, and a nearby woman steps in to help with tissues and calm guidance.

scenes.heading: 91 EXT. OCEAN PARK RESORT DINING AREA - EVENING 91 91
scenes.summary: Calum and Sophie eat dessert in silence after their rough day while a waiter brings Calum another beer and Tony performs on stage for a sparse audience.

scenes.heading: 92 EXT. OCEAN PARK AMPHITHEATRE - NIGHT 92 92
scenes.summary: Sophie signs them up for karaoke despite Calum's refusal to participate, and she defiantly approaches the stage alone expecting him to join her as the R.E.M. intro begins.

scenes.heading: 93 INT. HOTEL ROOM - NIGHT 93 93
scenes.summary: Calum watches playback on the video camera of Sophie introducing him as her marvelous father, but this time he doesn't smile and snaps the screen shut.

scenes.heading: 94 INT. OCEAN PARK RESORT GAMING/BAR AREA - NIGHT 94 94
scenes.summary: Sophie approaches the teens' drinking game table where they're taking shots, but when she lingers looking for inclusion, Olly asks about her dad and she doesn't know where he is.

scenes.heading: 95 EXT. BAR - NIGHT 95 95
scenes.summary: Drunk Laura approaches Sophie sitting alone at the bar and gives her the green wristband by removing it from her own wrist.

scenes.heading: 96 EXT. OCEAN PARK RESORT - GROUNDS - NIGHT 96 96
scenes.summary: Sophie walks alone through dark hotel grounds, gets lost at a fork in the path, then someone grabs her from behind covering her mouth until she breaks free and discovers it's Michael.

scenes.heading: 97 EXT. STREET - NIGHT 97 97
scenes.summary: Calum walks down a path toward shore, picks up a discarded cigarette butt to smoke the remaining drags, and continues past a taxi stand.

scenes.heading: 98 EXT. OCEAN PARK RESORT - COVERED POOL - NIGHT 98 98
scenes.summary: Sophie and Michael sit by a covered pool with their feet in the water, Michael confesses he likes her and asks if she likes him, then leans in to kiss her.

scenes.heading: 99 EXT. PUBLIC BEACH - NIGHT 99 99
scenes.summary: Calum reaches the beach, strips to boxer shorts, and walks into the dark water before disappearing from sight in the nearly pitch-black ocean.
scenes.turningPointNote: Calum enters the dark ocean alone at night and disappears from sight, suggesting a potential suicide attempt

scenes.heading: 100 INT. TÜRK HOTEL CORRIDOR - LATER 100 100
scenes.summary: Sophie stands outside their hotel room door knocking repeatedly with no response from inside.

scenes.heading: 101 INT. TÜRK HOTEL RECEPTION - MOMENTS LATER 101 101
scenes.summary: Sophie exits the stairs into the empty hotel reception area, calls out hello, waits a moment, then exits the building.

scenes.heading: 102 EXT. TÜRK HOTEL GROUNDS - MOMENTS LATER 102 102
scenes.summary: Sophie peers through a crack in a storage door and sees Toby and Alex kissing passionately.

scenes.heading: 103 EXT. TÜRK HOTEL POOLSIDE - LATER 103 103
scenes.summary: Sophie sleeps on a couch in the hotel reception area until a receptionist softly wakes her.

scenes.heading: 104 EXT. TÜRK HOTEL CORRIDOR - MOMENTS LATER 104 104
scenes.summary: The receptionist watches as Sophie uses her key card to enter the hotel room and they exchange good nights.

scenes.heading: 105 INT. HOTEL ROOM - CONTINUOUS 105 105
scenes.summary: Sophie enters the dark room to find Calum sprawled naked across the bed and quickly covers him with a sheet before getting into her own bed.

scenes.heading: 106 INT. HOTEL ROOM - CONTINUOUS 106 106
scenes.summary: The camera pushes in on Calum then pans down to the floor as a transition.

scenes.heading: 107 INT. NEW YORK CITY APARTMENT - NIGHT 107 107
scenes.summary: Adult Sophie sits on her bed touching the carpet with her toes while her partner wishes her happy birthday and an infant cries.

scenes.heading: 108 INT. RAVE 108 108
scenes.summary: Adult Sophie approaches Calum in the rave as he dances frantically, looking ashen and death-like with heavy erratic breathing.

scenes.heading: 109 INT. HOTEL ROOM - EARLY DAWN (PRE-SUNRISE) 109 109
scenes.summary: Calum films sleeping Sophie with the DV camera until a wake-up call interrupts, and he drops the camera onto the bed.

scenes.heading: 110 INT. BUS - DAWN 110 110
scenes.summary: Sophie and Calum ride a bus at dawn with Sophie playing with his sunglasses while he warns her to be careful with them.

scenes.heading: 111 EXT. ROADSIDE STOP - MORNING 111 111
scenes.summary: Sophie and Calum practice Tai Chi together behind the bus during a roadside stop.

scenes.heading: 112 EXT. COLD SPRING - MORNING 112 112
scenes.summary: Sophie gives Calum her watch and enters a cold spring pool to time herself while tourists compete around them.

scenes.heading: 113 EXT. COLD SPRING - A LITTLE LATER 113 113
scenes.summary: Calum wraps Sophie in a towel after her cold spring challenge and tells her she's much stronger than he is.

scenes.heading: 114 EXT. MUD BATHS - DAY 114 114
scenes.summary: Sophie and Calum sit in mud baths discussing Cleopatra's death while Sophie corrects Calum about the historical details.

scenes.heading: 115 EXT. RAFT - A LITTLE LATER 115 115
scenes.summary: On a raft, Sophie tells Calum about kissing Michael and Calum urgently confirms the boy's age before giving her advice about relationships.

scenes.heading: 116 EXT. AMPHITHEATRE AT KAUNOS - AFTERNOON 116 116
scenes.summary: Sophie organizes the tour group to sing 'For He's a Jolly Good Fellow' to Calum from the amphitheatre stage.

scenes.heading: 117 INT. HOTEL ROOM - EVENING 117 117
scenes.summary: Calum sits naked on the bed with his head in his hands, sobbing and gasping for breath as the camera slowly pulls back.
scenes.turningPointNote: Calum's emotional breakdown reveals the depth of his hidden depression and despair

scenes.heading: 118 EXT. TÜRK HOTEL POOLSIDE - DUSK 118 118
scenes.summary: Sophie sits with Portuguese girls Andréa and Marcia, taking turns stroking a stray kitten that purrs on Andréa's knee.

scenes.heading: 119 INT. OCEAN PARK RESORT GAMING/BAR AREA - NIGHT 119 119
scenes.summary: Sophie plays in the semi-final of the hotel's pool tournament against Toby while a crowd watches.

scenes.heading: 120 INT. OCEAN PARK RESORT GAMING/BAR AREA - A LITTLE LATER 120 120
scenes.summary: Sophie defeats Steve in the pool tournament final by potting his ball in error then skillfully sinking her remaining balls and the black.

scenes.heading: 121 INT. UPMARKET RESTAURANT - NIGHT 121 121
scenes.summary: Sophie and Calum share a sundae at an upmarket restaurant while a photographer takes their Polaroid picture.

scenes.heading: 122 EXT. STREET - NIGHT 122 122
scenes.summary: Calum and Sophie walk back toward their hotel at night with moonlight reflecting off the ocean and party music in the distance.

scenes.heading: 123 EXT. TÜRK HOTEL - NIGHT 123 123
scenes.summary: Calum tries to pull Sophie onto the makeshift dance floor but she refuses, saying she never dances, so he ventures in alone.

scenes.heading: 124 INT. RAVE 124 124
scenes.summary: Adult Sophie reaches Calum in the rave but cannot connect with him due to his erratic movement and screams inaudibly for him to stop.

scenes.heading: 125 EXT. TÜRK HOTEL 125 125
scenes.summary: Sophie lightheartedly pleads for Calum to stop as he beckons her to dance, his face lit up and playful.

scenes.heading: 126 INT. RAVE 126 126
scenes.summary: Adult Sophie violently fights against Calum's movement in the rave, slapping and pounding his chest with clenched fists.

scenes.heading: 127 EXT. TÜRK HOTEL 127 127
scenes.summary: Calum lifts Sophie up and spins her around with her head pressed against his chest as she briefly acquiesces.

scenes.heading: 128 INT. RAVE 128 128
scenes.summary: Adult Sophie finally grabs hold of Calum in the rave, wrapping herself around him as he momentarily settles.

scenes.heading: 129 EXT. TÜRK HOTEL 129 129
scenes.summary: Calum drops Sophie to her feet, both euphoric, and she playfully pushes him off on the turn of the strobe.
scenes.turningPointNote: The final moment of connection between father and daughter before the transition to loss

scenes.heading: 130 INT. RAVE 130 130
scenes.summary: Calum vanishes from the rave, leaving Adult Sophie standing alone until the strobe cuts to black.
scenes.turningPointNote: Calum's disappearance represents the ultimate loss and separation

scenes.heading: 131 INT. APARTMENT 131 131
scenes.summary: Young Sophie walks away from Calum's camera at the airport, telling him it was the best holiday ever as he asks her to give his love to her mum.

scenes.heading: 132 INT. AIRPORT - DAY 132 132
scenes.summary: Calum waves at the camera, takes deep breaths, then enters the rave through double doors at the end of the airport corridor.
scenes.turningPointNote: Calum's entry into the rave symbolizes his final departure from life

scenes.heading: 133 INT. APARTMENT 133 133
scenes.summary: Adult Sophie leaves her apartment as an infant cries off screen and the camera pans away from the television.

scenes.heading: 134 EXT. PUBLIC BEACH (TURKEY) - SUNSET 134 134
scenes.summary: Calum and Sophie sit on the beach at sunset, then jump up and sprint together toward the sea.

scenes.heading: 135 EXT. UNDERWATER 135 135
scenes.summary: Sophie's diving mask continues to sink into the depths of the sea.

scenes.heading: 136 EXT. HOTEL BALCONY - DAY 136 136
scenes.summary: Calum's cigarette end rests on the edge of the roof below their hotel room balcony.

scenes.heading: 137 EXT. TÜRK HOTEL GROUNDS - DAY 137 137
scenes.summary: An unattended hose gushes water on the hotel grounds while Sophie's lost bag lies hidden in the greenery.

scenes.heading: 138 INT. HOTEL ROOM 138 138
scenes.summary: Written postcards have fallen to the hotel room floor, including one from Calum to Sophie reading 'I love you very much. Never forget that.'

scenes.heading: 139 EXT. ROAD 139 139
scenes.summary: The sun dips behind the mountains at sunset.

structuralWarnings.text: All 3 key moments were auto-corrected by Phase 1C
